2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202 - ASI: 29

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  02 = 0 * 2
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  012 = 0 * 12
  211 = 2 * 11
  212 = 2 * 12
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0200 = 02 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1202 = 12 * 02
  2011 = 20 * 11
  12212 = 12 * 212
  21110 = 211 * 10
  22211 = 22 * 211
  121010 = 12 * 1010
  201102 = 2011 * 02
  0122011 = 012 * 2011
  00001202 = 0000 * 1202
  12212121010 = 12212 * 121010
  21110201102 = 21110 * 201102
  020000001202 = 0200 * 00001202
  222110122011 = 22211 * 0122011
  12212121010020000001202 = 12212121010 * 020000001202
  21110201102222110122011 = 21110201102 * 222110122011
  2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202 = 21110201102222110122011 * 12212121010020000001202
